title: Backstage User Feedback Event
description: Optional UI metadata that can be attached to domain events for real-time dashboard and pipeline visualization feedback. Defined in EVENT_ARCHITECTURE.md §12. When present, the frontend uses these fields to display progress indicators and human-readable status messages.

message.description: Human-readable status message for the frontend (e.g., 'Transcription in progress...', 'Track approved').

progress.description: Percentage progress of the current operation (0-100). Optional; omit when progress is indeterminate.

severity.description: Visual severity level for the frontend notification.

ui.description: UI feedback metadata. Attached as a top-level 'ui' field on the event envelope alongside the standard envelope fields.

ui.message: Track approved and ready for transcoding
